message.reasoning_content: Ok, the user wants me to say hello in exactly three words. So, "Hello, how are you?" is too long. Maybe "Hi there!" but that's two words. Hmm, what about "Hello, world!"? No, that's two words too. Wait, "Hello there" is two words. Maybe "Hello, friend!"? Still two. Oh, "Hello, hello, hello" is three words but that's weird. Maybe "Greetings to you" is three words. Yes, that works.
